heading: Award of grants
label: 12225 Award of grants
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13865 of Title 42

children.text: Demonstrated need and evidence of the ability to provide the services described in the plan required under .section 12223 of this title
The Attorney General shall attempt, to the extent practicable, to achieve an equitable geographic distribution of grant awards.
